creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to w0z from comment #0)
> the network card does not load, so my screen is completely scrambled.
I don't quite follow: how can absence of the NIC affect video output?  You should also try the latest versions of FreeBSD.  Reading the specs, Samsung Series 7 Chronos 700z is based on Intel CPU w/ integrated graphics (HD 3000) and additionally has discrete AMD Radeon HD 6490M GPU.  Both should be supported fairly well, however, full multi-gfx support is still lacking in FreeBSD.  Regardless, it's probably better to stick to one particular card for console video during the installation and initial X11 setup.  Your BIOS settings might also give you some clues.
